boundary_statement: DISPLAY-ONLY PERSONAL RUNTIME OBSERVATION. Not a signal, not buy/sell/hold, not entry/stop/target, not broker/order/execution, not PnL or win/loss, not optimizer, not validation verdict, not adaptation decision, not production readiness.
